prompt:
Observe the elements in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn style annotations to each object. Please identify and label the objects in the photo.
Description Rules: • Use thin hand-drawn lines resembling white strokes • Single-stroke style, casual, with a slightly uneven feel • Add stroke outlines along the periphery of objects • Use arrows or dotted lines for visual guidance
Text Rules: • Handwritten font style (cute Japanese aesthetic) • Short sentences, like self-muttering notes • Diary-like tone with a touch of emotion
Annotation Generation Rules: Do not over-decorate, preserve white space.
